offer: For freelancer using Upwork processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoicing causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice generation instead of manual invoicing through spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancer invoicing help
Indie Hackers discussions on invoicing tools
DM outreach to freelancer with demo video
Community forums where freelancers share resources
try_it: Let users try template-based invoice creation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as invoice templates
